subcodes.first_line: O ye two leaves near the divine threshold, two truthful and aware witnesses testify that the handmaiden near the threshold of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو ورقه مقربه درگاه کبریا دو شاهد صادق آگاه گواهند که کنیز مقرب درگاه خدا
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @love of God, @firmness in the Covenant
